name: hb_1_20
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Hangang Group Hanbao Steel Co., Ltd. over 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12 compute and store: peak_flue_gas, mean_flue_gas, std_flue_gas (float), peak_flue_gas_offset_hours (whole hours from 2025-06-10 00:00 to the peak, int).

turns.query: Identify high emission periods of Hangang Group Hanbao Steel Co., Ltd. that correlate with adverse weather conditions during 2025-06-10 to 2025-06-12.
